page_content: Required Introductory Physics and Geology GEOL100 Physical Geology or GEOL120 Environmental Geology GEOL110 Physical Geology Laboratory MATH140 Calculus I MATH141 Calculus II MATH241 Calculus III PHYS161 General Physics: Mechanics and Particle Dynamics or PHYS171 Introductory Physics: Mechanics PHYS265 Introduction to Scientiﬁc Programming PHYS272 Introductory Physics: Fields or PHYS260 General Physics: Electricity, Magnetism and Thermodynamics PHYS273 Intermediate Oscillations and Waves or PHYS270 General Physics: Waves, Optics, Relativity and Modern Physics PHYS275 Experimental Physics I: Mechanics and Waves
